title: The Ring (district)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Ring}}
'''The Ring''' was a residential district of the city [[Bartyn's Landing]] on [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]]. Initially used as an overcrowded area to host the many "indentured servants" of the city, it would eventually improve in condition.

==History==
Around five hundred years before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], [[Hugo Bartyn]], an agent of [[Outer Rim Oreworks Company]], was assigned as [[Administrator (ORO)|Administrator]] of the mines of the planet [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]]. Bartyn had noticed that Lamaredd was also rich in seafood, and he intended to build a fishing town from which he could export the delicacies without any interference from ORO.

Using his own savings, Bartyn bought a beat-up [[Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc./Legends|Hoersch-Kessel]] [[LH-3010 capital freighter]] from some [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] traders and used mining equipment to blow up parts of it, creating the skeleton of the coastal town. The outer area of the ship, reminiscent of a circumference without one segment, became "the Ring", the area of the city where the fishermen would live.

Initially, Bartyn forcefully recruited aliens from several amphibious species, including [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrians]], [[Iskalonian]]s, [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamaris]] and [[Quarren/Legends|Quarrens]], and forced them to live in that undersized area, in very poor living conditions.

Eventually, c. [[517 BBY]], Bartyn was forced to deal with the [[Sailor's Union]] and open unused parts of the Ring to aliens. He also allowed a number of aliens to settle outside the Landing, which improved the habitability of the Ring.

Five centuries after Bartyn, the Ring was still a residential area, but the quality of life there had improved, even if it still had several slum neighborhoods. Many inhabitants of the Landing used their personal [[skimmersub]]s to travel through the lower levels of the Ring.

In [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], a well-liked member of the [[Bartyn's Landing town council|town council of the city]] secretly frequented the Ring to enjoy the local licentiousness and [[Spice/Legends|spice]]. During one of these visits, this person was murdered, and local [[Security Chief (ORO)|Security Chief]] [[Mix Liddell]] began an official investigation.
